name: Apple-Raising Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Coat a standard size muffin pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
5. In a small bowl, stir together buttermilk, applesauce, egg whites, and canola oil.
6. Pour the buttermilk mixture into the well of the dry ingredients.
7. Stir just until evenly moistened. Do not overmix.
8. Gently fold in apple pieces and raisins.
9. Divide the batter evenly among 12 muffin cups.
10. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
